vocab.meaning: bước đột phá về trí tuệ
vocab.example: There is nothing quite like the rush of an intellectual breakthrough when a complex theorem finally makes sense.

vocab.meaning: sự xung đột giữa các hệ tư tưởng
vocab.example: Studying political science is fascinating because you get to analyze the constant clash of ideologies that shapes our laws.

vocab.meaning: cách diễn giải sắc sảo, đa chiều
vocab.example: Literature seminars have taught me to seek a nuanced interpretation of a text rather than just looking at the surface meaning.

vocab.meaning: sự liên quan đến các vấn đề đương đại
vocab.example: What captivates me most about sociology is its direct relevance to contemporary issues like urban poverty and social media.

vocab.meaning: sự truy vấn/nghiên cứu mang tính phản biện
vocab.example: My course encourages a spirit of critical inquiry, teaching us to never take data at face value.

vocab.meaning: những hệ quả/ứng dụng trong thế giới thực
vocab.example: It is exciting to study economic theories that have profound real-world implications for international trade.

vocab.meaning: các cuộc thảo luận/diễn ngôn học thuật
vocab.example: Participating in academic discourse with leading experts in the field has been the highlight of my semester.

vocab.meaning: mổ xẻ/phân tích dữ liệu phức tạp
vocab.example: I find great satisfaction in using statistical software to dissect complex data and find hidden patterns.
My professors are a wealth of knowledge, providing insights that go far beyond what is written in the syllabus.

vocab.meaning: mở đường cho/tạo điều kiện cho
vocab.example: The most interesting part of my research is that it might pave the way for more sustainable battery technologies.
